title: rubus pallidus var. trichostachys
intro: Rubus pallidus var. trichostachys, also known as the pale bramble, is a variety of the Rubus pallidus species, a type of flowering shrub that belongs to the rose family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Rubus pallidus var. trichostachys include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various skin conditions. The herbal preparation of the plant can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, or salves, which are often used topically to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
